name: Poppy

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Iron Ambassador
passive.description_source: Innate: Periodically,  Poppy  throws her buckler as her next basic attack, which has  bonus range and deals bonus magic damage. The buckler then falls nearby and remains for a few seconds, which she and enemy champions can step over to either retrieve or destroy it.

effects.description: Innate: Periodically, Poppy's next basic attack on-attack is empowered to throw her buckler, gaining 350 bonus range and dealing 20 : 198.82 (based on level) bonus magic damage. After it hits, the buckler then falls to a location near the target over 1 second, landing and remaining there for up to 4 seconds.

Poppy can move over the buckler to retrieve it, gaining a shield for 11% : 21.06% (based on level) of her maximum health for 3 seconds. If the buckler kills the target, or if the target is already dead when the buckler hits it, the buckler will bounce back to Poppy instead of falling. Enemy champions can move over the buckler to destroy it.

passive.description: Innate: Periodically, Poppy's next basic attack on-attack is empowered to throw her buckler, gaining 350 bonus range and dealing 20 : 198.82 (based on level) bonus magic damage. After it hits, the buckler then falls to a location near the target over 1 second, landing and remaining there for up to 4 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Poppy will not throw the buckler if she begins her attack windup before Iron Ambassador's cooldown has elapsed.

basic_ability_1.name: Hammer Shock
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Poppy smashes the area in the target direction, dealing physical damage to enemies hit based on their maximum health.

effects.context_notes: Active: Poppy smashes the area in the target direction, dealing physical damage to enemies hit.
Active: Poppy smashes the area in the target direction, dealing physical damage to enemies hit.
Active: Poppy smashes the area in the target direction, dealing physical damage to enemies hit.
The impact creates a field for 1 second that slows enemies within, which then ruptures to deal the same physical damage.
The impact creates a field for 1 second that slows enemies within, which then ruptures to deal the same physical damage.
The impact creates a field for 1 second that slows enemies within, which then ruptures to deal the same physical damage.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Poppy smashes the area in the target direction, dealing physical damage to enemies hit. Against minions and monsters, the damage based on their health ratio is capped.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Spell shields will block only a single instance of damage.

basic_ability_2.name: Steadfast Presence
basic_ability_2.description_source: Passive:  Poppy increases her  total armor and  total magic resist. This effect is doubled while she is at low health.

effects.description: Passive - Stubborn to a Fault: Poppy increases her total armor and total magic resistance by 12%, doubled to 24% while she is below 40% maximum health.

effects.context_notes: Active: Poppy gains 40% bonus movement speed and creates an aura around herself for 2 seconds, causing all enemies who attempt to dash into or within it to be dealt magic damage and knocked up for 0.5 seconds. If a target was successfully interrupted, they become grounded and slowed by 25% for 2 seconds.

effects.description: Steadfast Presence can only block a single dash per enemy per cast.

basic_ability_2.description: Passive - Stubborn to a Fault: Poppy increases her total armor and total magic resistance by 12%, doubled to 24% while she is below 40% maximum health.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Stubborn to a Fault's armor amplification stacks with an instance of recursion.

basic_ability_3.name: Heroic Charge
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Poppy  dashes to the target enemy, dealing physical damage and  carrying them forward. If the target hits terrain, Poppy deals the same physical damage again and briefly  stuns them.

effects.context_notes: Active: Poppy dashes to the target enemy's location.
If the target hits terrain, she stops to deal the same physical damage again and stuns them for a duration.
If the target hits terrain, she stops to deal the same physical damage again and stuns them for a duration.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Poppy dashes to the target enemy's location. If they are in range upon arrival, she deals physical damage and carries them along with her for up to 400 units.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Poppy will be ordered to basic attack the target.

ultimate.name: Keeper's Verdict

effects.description: Active: Poppy charges while being slowed by 15% for up to 4 seconds to increase Keeper's Verdict's range and knock back distance over 0.5 seconds after the first 0.5 seconds of the channel. Keeper's Verdict can be recast within the duration.

effects.context_notes: Recast: Poppy releases the charge to launch her hammer upwards, dealing physical damage to enemies nearby and in an area in front of her and knocking them up for 1 second.
If Keeper's Verdict was charged for at least 0.

effects.description: If the charge is interrupted or completes without reactivation, Keeper's Verdict is cancelled and the ability is put on a 30-second cooldown.

ultimate.description: Active: Poppy charges while being slowed by 15% for up to 4 seconds to increase Keeper's Verdict's range and knock back distance over 0.5 seconds after the first 0.5 seconds of the channel. Keeper's Verdict can be recast within the duration.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The erupting hammer of the charged cast that sends out a missile will be centered on the first champion struck, not at the location the missile collided with them.
ultimate.description_source: Active: Poppy charges while being slowed by 15% for up to 4 seconds to increase Keeper's Verdict's range and knock back distance over 0.5 seconds after the first 0.5 seconds of the channel. Keeper's Verdict can be recast within the duration.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

sources.type: League of Legends Wiki (ability data template)
sources.used_for: manual behavior verification for Steadfast Presence execution timing, activation gating, and player-visible resolution semantics

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
